message:
The other night, we had a surprise blackout. Just as we were settling down to watch a movie, the lights flickered out, and I realized my phone was only at 15%. Of course, that’s when I remembered I hadn’t charged my power bank in ages! 

While I fumbled around for the flashlight (which I thankfully had on hand), I thought about how relying solely on my phone can be a bit risky during these unexpected moments. It’s great for entertainment, but when it dies, so does my connection to the outside world—and my favorite show! 

After a bit of giggling in the dark, I grabbed a trusty lantern and we ended up playing board games instead. Sometimes, a little hiccup like this can turn into a cozy family night. 

Have you ever had a tech fail at just the wrong time? What did you do to make the best of it? P.S. This little refresher helped me think through my backup plans!
